steps: File NTA Form 11 refund application for JPY 119,850 overpaid withholding tax on Nintendo Co Ltd dividend
Submit Norwegian tax residency certificate to MUFG Custody confirming JP-NO treaty 10% rate eligibility
Request MUFG Custody review their withholding calculation and process direct refund if possible
Follow up with NTA Tokyo Regional Taxation Bureau if custodian refund is unavailable

references.title: NTA – Refund of Overpaid Withholding Tax (Form 11)
